name: Sweet and Sour Lamb Chops
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup cider or red wine vinegar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place onions and butter in the slow cooker; set on low and cook for 2 to 3 hours.
2. Add cream de menthe, cider or red wine vinegar, sugar, and lemon juice; stir and cook until the mixture looks syrupy, about half an hour.
3. Stir in beef broth and rosemary; simmer on low for 4 hours.
